text:
よし、こんなものだな。
期待した以上に腕を上げているな。

オレも腕を上げたつもりだが
すっかりお前の引き立て役だった。

ともあれ話は後だ。
では、一度帰還する

That should about do it. You've come along a
lot further than I'd imagined.

Here I was thinking I'd made progress too, but
I only served to make you look even better.

Let's save the chit-chat for some other time
though. We should head back.
